original_filename: Compliance with the Health and Social Care Act 2008 Code of Practice on the Prevention and Control of Infections V2.0FEB24.docx

questions.question_text: Infection control lead for the practice is
Systems to manage and monitor the prevention and control of infection - How we follow the code of practice
The provision and maintenance of a clean and appropriate environment - How we follow the code of practice
Appropriate antimicrobial use and stewardship - How we follow the code of practice
The provision of suitable accurate information on infections to service users - How we follow the code of practice
Policy for ensuring people who have or are at risk of developing an infection are identified promptly - How we follow the code of practice
Systems to ensure all care workers are aware of their responsibilities in preventing and controlling infection - How we follow the code of practice
The provision or ability to secure adequate isolation facilities - How we follow the code of practice
The ability to secure adequate access to laboratory support - How we follow the code of practice
Policies designed for individual care that help prevent and control infections - How we follow the code of practice
System to manage staff health and wellbeing and organisational obligation to manage infection prevention and control - How we follow the code of practice

title: Compliance with the Health and Social Care Act 2008 Code of Practice on the Prevention and Control of Infections V2.0FEB24
